arts.ttl: Man Utd news: Marcus Rashford handed advice as on-loan star seeks revenge
arts.sum: Manchester United's Premier League struggles have come at a time when some of their recently departed stars - temporary or permanent - have enjoyed a better time of things

arts.ttl: What time is Champions League draw? How to watch as Arsenal, Liverpool & Villa learn opponents
arts.sum: The 16 teams in the Champions League round of 16 have been confirmed following the knockout play-off round, with three Premier League representatives still alive

arts.ttl: Chelsea transfer latest: Cole Palmer exit rumours swirl as contract clause 'revealed' for summer window
arts.sum: Chelsea's season continues to falter and reports now claim that Cole Palmer could sensationally leave the club in the upcoming summer transfer window.

arts.ttl: How Liverpool's next five fixtures compare to Arsenal's after Aston Villa setback
arts.sum: Liverpool and Arsenal continue to do battle in the race for the Premier League title, with the former eight points clear after drawing with Aston Villa midweek.

arts.ttl: Chelsea learn potential Conference League opponents and could face Man Utd reunion
arts.sum: Chelsea have a perfect record so far in the Europa Conference League and could face Real Betis in the last 16 - with Manchester United flop Antony heading to the Spanish side on loan last month

arts.ttl: Chelsea and Tottenham relieved as UEFA 'bend rules' for Premier League pair
arts.sum: UEFA rules usually state that two clubs from the same city are not permitted to play a match on the same night, but Chelsea and Tottenham will be given special dispensation to do so next month

arts.ttl: Aston Villa to discover Champions League round of 16 opponents as draw permutations explained
arts.sum: For example, teams that finished first and second in the league phase will face the winners of the knockout phase play-off ties involving the 15th, 16th, 17th and 18th-placed teams in the round of 16. The round of 16 will be largely determined by clubs' final position in the league phase, with numerous teams drawn into their position in the bracket last month .

arts.ttl: Youri Tielemans speaks out on Aston Villa's Champions League chances as 'frustration' explained
arts.sum: Youri Tielemans speaks out on Aston Villa's Champions League chances as 'frustration' explained Youri Tielemans scored in Aston Villa's 2-2 draw with Liverpool on Wednesday night

arts.ttl: Raheem Sterling or Mikel Merino? Paul Merson predicts Mikel Arteta's big Arsenal decision
arts.sum: Arsenal boss Mikel Arteta will be faced with another difficult choice this weekend of who to play up front amid their injury crisis, after Mikel Merino scored a brace against Leicester last week as a makeshift forward

arts.ttl: Chelsea have to make signing 'one of the best' wingers their number one priority after recent developments - opinion
arts.sum: Chelsea look as if they are going to be working hard on strengthening the attack when the summer transfer window opens at the end of...
